sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64398" key="magari/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαγαρ-ίσκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πινακίσκος</ref></xr>, Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαργαρίσκος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
